key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show the HyperGnome indicator in the top panel

key.name: inner-gap
key.description: Gap between tiled windows in pixels

key.name: outer-gap
key.description: Gap between tiled windows and screen edges in pixels

key.name: split-ratio
key.description: Default ratio when splitting a window (0.1 - 0.9)

key.name: active-border-size
key.description: Width of the active window border in pixels

key.name: active-border-color
key.description: CSS color for the active window border

key.name: active-border-radius
key.description: Corner radius of the active window border in pixels

key.name: float-list
key.description: List of WM_CLASS values that should always float
